title: Isla's New Friend
synopsis: Isla, a shy girl with red hair, discovers the joy of friendship when she meets Maya at the playground. With help from her mom, Isla learns to be brave and make new friends.

pages.text: Isla walked to the big playground with her mom. She had long wavy red hair and bright green eyes. Isla felt shy around all the new kids. 'I don't know anyone here,' she whispered to Mom.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes walking with her mom toward a bright sunny playground with diverse kids playing on swings and slides, colorful primary colors filling the scene
illustration.alt: Isla and her mom approaching a busy playground

pages.text: Mom smiled at Isla. 'Making friends takes time, sweetheart. Just be yourself and be kind.' Isla watched the other children laugh and play together. She wished she could join them.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes standing close to her mom while diverse kids play happily on playground equipment with bright primary colors and lots of white space
illustration.alt: Isla talking with her mom while watching other children play

pages.text: Isla sat on a bench and watched a girl with dark braids go down the slide. The girl looked fun and friendly. But Isla felt too nervous to say hello. What if the girl didn't want to be friends?

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sitting on a bench watching a girl with dark braids on a colorful slide, bright sunny playground setting with joyful energetic atmosphere
illustration.alt: Isla watching another girl play on the slide

pages.text: The girl with braids walked over to Isla. 'Hi! I'm Maya. Do you want to play with me?' Maya had a big smile and kind eyes. Isla felt her cheeks turn pink, but she smiled back.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes meeting Maya who has dark braids, both girls smiling on a bright sunny playground with primary colors and white space, diverse kids playing in background

pages.text: 'I'm Isla,' she said quietly. 'I would like to play, but I'm not very good at playground games.' Maya laughed. 'That's okay! I can teach you. Let's start with something easy.'

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes talking with Maya near playground swings, bright joyful energetic scene with inclusive playground activities and laughter in the background
illustration.alt: Isla and Maya having their first conversation

pages.text: Maya showed Isla how to pump her legs on the swings. 'Just like this!' Maya called out. Soon both girls were swinging high and laughing together. Isla felt happy and brave.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes swinging next to Maya on colorful swings, both girls laughing with joy in a bright sunny playground setting with primary colors
illustration.alt: Isla and Maya swinging together and laughing

pages.text: After swinging, Maya and Isla played on the monkey bars. Maya helped Isla reach each bar. 'You're doing great!' Maya cheered. Isla felt proud of herself for trying something new.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes on monkey bars with Maya helping her, bright sunny playground with diverse kids playing, joyful energetic atmosphere with primary colors
illustration.alt: Maya helping Isla on the monkey bars

pages.text: When it was time to go home, Isla felt sad to leave. 'Will you be here tomorrow?' she asked Maya. 'Yes! And we can play together again,' Maya promised. The girls hugged goodbye.

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hugging Maya goodbye at the bright sunny playground, friendship activities visible in background with inclusive diverse kids and white space

pages.text: Isla ran to her mom with a big smile. 'Mom, I made a friend! Her name is Maya and she's really nice.' Mom hugged Isla tight. 'I'm so proud of you for being brave and kind, sweetheart.'

illustration.description: A girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes running excitedly to her mom with arms wide open, bright sunny playground background with slides and swings, joyful energetic scene with primary colors
illustration.alt: Isla running to tell her mom about her new friend

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: How did Isla feel when she first arrived at the playground?
questions.explanation: Isla felt shy around all the new kids and whispered to her mom that she didn't know anyone there.

questions.question: What was the name of Isla's new friend?
questions.explanation: The girl with dark braids introduced herself as Maya when she asked Isla to play.

questions.question: What did Maya teach Isla to do first?
questions.explanation: Maya showed Isla how to pump her legs on the swings, and they swung high together while laughing.

questions.question: What advice did Isla's mom give her about making friends?
choices: wait for others to talk first
questions.explanation: Mom told Isla that making friends takes time and to just be yourself and be kind.

questions.question: How did Isla feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Isla ran to her mom with a big smile, excited to share that she made a friend, and Mom said she was proud of Isla for being brave and kind.
